Scripts.OnLoad:
local sz = 32 -- fallback size; atlas manifest overrides with real sprite size
local tl = self:CreateTexture(nil, "BORDER") tl:SetAtlas("Tooltip-NineSlice-CornerTopLeft", true) tl:SetSize(sz, sz) tl:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self, "TOPLEFT", 0, 0)
local tr = self:CreateTexture(nil, "BORDER") tr:SetAtlas("Tooltip-NineSlice-CornerTopRight", true) tr:SetSize(sz, sz) tr:SetPoint("TOPRIGHT", self, "TOPRIGHT", 0, 0)
local bl = self:CreateTexture(nil, "BORDER") bl:SetAtlas("Tooltip-NineSlice-CornerBottomLeft", true) bl:SetSize(sz, sz) bl:SetPoint("BOTTOMLEFT", self, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, 0)
local br = self:CreateTexture(nil, "BORDER") br:SetAtlas("Tooltip-NineSlice-CornerBottomRight", true) br:SetSize(sz, sz) br:SetPoint("BOTTOMRIGHT", self, "BOTTOMRIGHT", 0, 0)
